SQLLite.SQL: SELECT eo.std_event_id as "StandardEventId" , eo.issue_stage as "IssueStage" , eo.order_type_id as "OrderType" , eo.code as "Code" , ae.report_value_1 as "ReportValue1" , ae.process_stage as "ProcessStage" , ae.ae_number as "AeNumber" , ae.event_date as "EventDate" , aa.case_number as "CaseNumber" FROM event_outputs eo, ae_events ae, ae_applications aa WHERE ae.ae_event_seq = ${param.aeEventSeq} AND eo.std_event_id = ae.std_event_id AND ((eo.issue_stage is not null AND eo.issue_stage = ae.issue_stage) OR (eo.issue_stage is null)) AND aa.ae_number = ae.ae_number ORDER BY eo.code,eo.order_type_id

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
